reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Fuimos con 42 personas y la atención fue muy rápida (si es grupo grande avisar antes de ir). Para destacar la atención de la señorita Silvia. Siempre atenta a todos los detalles. Muchas gracias.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. We were a group of 42 people and the service was very quick (if you're a large group, please let them know beforehand). Special mention goes to Ms. Silvia. She was always attentive to every detail. Thank you very much.

reviews.comment:
Llegamos sin avisar con un grupo de 30 personas de la empresa de julio lopez viajes . Y la buena predisposición de Silvia y su compañera para atendernos fue excelente.  Super amables . Rápidas en el preparado del servicio. Gracias chicas x todo

(Translated by Google)
We arrived unannounced with a group of 30 people from Julio Lopez Viajes travel agency. Silvia and her colleague were incredibly helpful and accommodating. They were super friendly and quick to prepare our service. Thank you so much, ladies, for everything!
